name: Dropbox
description: Dropbox is a cloud file storage and synchronization service. The API lets you upload, download, organize, search, and share files and folders stored in a user's Dropbox account programmatically.

capabilities.name: upload_file
capabilities.description: Upload a file to Dropbox at a specified path. Supports files up to 150 MB; for larger files, use upload sessions.

capabilities.name: download_file
capabilities.description: Download a file from Dropbox by its path or ID. The file content is returned in the response body.

capabilities.name: list_folder
capabilities.description: List the contents of a folder in Dropbox, returning metadata for each file and subfolder.

capabilities.name: create_folder
capabilities.description: Create a new folder at the specified path in the user's Dropbox.

capabilities.name: search_files
capabilities.description: Search for files and folders in a user's Dropbox by filename or content query string.

capabilities.name: share_file
capabilities.description: Create a shared link for a file or folder so that others can access it via URL.
